title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. divertens
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. divertens, also known as the hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion-like flowering plants of the genus Hieracium. The medicinal properties of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. divertens include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and serve as an antiseptic agent to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. divertens include infusions and teas made from its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
